creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mezz
Date: Sun Dec 30 06:33:28 2012
New Revision: 309653
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309653

Log:
  shared-mime-info currently registers in plist all auto-generated files (those
  in share/mime/*/ directories), while only files in share/mime/packages/ should
  be registered, and then update-mime-database should generate the others. The
  same applies to many more ports, but that's not the point here. Anyway,
  registering those files can create conflicts when another package updates the
  definition of one of such auto-generated files. (written by avilla@)
  
  -Minor correct grammar in COMMENT/pkg-descr.
  -some clean up
  -Bump the PORTREVISION.
  
  PR:		ports/168220
  Submitted by:	avilla

Deleted:
  head/misc/shared-mime-info/files/patch-Makefile.in
Modified:
  head/misc/shared-mime-info/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/shared-mime-info/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/shared-mime-info/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/misc/shared-mime-info/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/shared-mime-info/Makefile	Sun Dec 30 06:20:27 2012	(r309652)
+++ head/misc/shared-mime-info/Makefile	Sun Dec 30 06:33:28 2012	(r309653)
@@ -1,22 +1,19 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	shared-mime-info
-# Date created:        31 May 2002
-# Whom:                olgeni@FreeBSD.org
-#
+# Created by: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
 # $FreeBSD$
 #   $MCom: ports/misc/shared-mime-info/Makefile,v 1.16 2009/11/28 05:59:02 mezz Exp $
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	shared-mime-info
 PORTVERSION=	1.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	misc gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	http://people.freedesktop.org/~hadess/
 
 MAINTAINER=	gnome@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A MIME type database from the FreeDesktop project
+COMMENT=	MIME types database from the freedesktop.org project
 
 USE_XZ=		yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--disable-update-mimedb
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_GNOME=	glib20 libxml2 intltool gnomehack intlhack pkgconfig
@@ -26,7 +23,8 @@ MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
 MAN1=		update-mime-database.1
 
-PKGINSTALL=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-install
+SUB_FILES=	pkg-install
+SUB_LIST=	MIMEDIRS="${MIMEDIRS:O:u}"
 
 MIMEDIRS=	${LOCALBASE}/share/mime \
 		${PREFIX}/share/mime
@@ -34,14 +32,10 @@ MIMESUBDIRS=	application audio image ino
 		packages text video x-epoc x-content
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%MIMEDIRS%%|${MIMEDIRS}|g' \
-		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}|g' \
 		${WRKSRC}/update-mime-database.c
 
 post-install:
-	@${SED} -e 's|%%PREFIX%%|${PREFIX}| ; \
-		s|%%MIMEDIRS%%|${MIMEDIRS}|' \
-		< ${FILESDIR}/pkg-install.in > ${PKGINSTALL}
+	@${SETENV} "PKG_PREFIX=${PREFIX}" ${SH} ${PKGINSTALL} ${PKGNAME} POST-INSTALL
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/misc/shared-mime-info/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/shared-mime-info/pkg-descr	Sun Dec 30 06:20:27 2012	(r309652)
+++ head/misc/shared-mime-info/pkg-descr	Sun Dec 30 06:33:28 2012	(r309653)
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 The freedesktop.org project provides a shared MIME database to avoid
 inconsistencies between desktops. This database has been created by
-converting the existing KDE and GNOME databases to the a format and
-merging them together. 
+converting the existing KDE and GNOME databases to a common format and
+merging them together.
 
 WWW: http://www.freedesktop.org/wiki/Software/shared-mime-info
